comparisons.name: pattern-visible-source-frame
comparisons.finding: This is the reliable pattern oracle: source and target are copied together and Figma renders the pattern. OpenPencil resolves the source and now uses a closer Figma-like pattern origin, but exact row spacing/tile origin still differs.

comparisons.name: rich-text-decorations
comparisons.finding: Recreated rich text decoration oracle. Derived-glyph decorations now use glyph positions and font metrics instead of inline pixel offsets; colored decoration row bounds are close, but glyph/text rendering differences still dominate the raster diff.

comparisons.name: nested-luminance-mask
comparisons.finding: Raw AE is high because antialiasing touches many edge pixels, but RMSE is very low and the output is structurally close. Future mask comparison should use tolerant/perceptual metrics.

comparisons.name: pattern-target-without-source
comparisons.finding: Copying/exporting only a pattern-filled target does not include its source node in clipboard data; OpenPencil must fall back without whole-document context.

comparisons.name: pattern-frame-with-hidden-source
comparisons.finding: Resolving pattern sources by imported Figma source id works in OpenPencil, but this hidden-source frame oracle renders blank in Figma and is not a parity baseline.

nextActions: Continue tuning pattern row spacing and tile origin against pattern-visible-source-frame.
Use perceptual/color-tolerant image diff for mask comparisons instead of raw absolute-error counts.
Render rich decoration styles/colors for Figma-derived glyph paths or reliably fall back to paragraph text when fonts are available.
